/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/srt_cam_push.c.o CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/app_config.c.o CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/audio_device.c.o CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/control_server.c.o CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/gst_runtime.c.o CMakeFiles/srt_cam_push.dir/telemetry_injector.c.o -o srt_cam_push  -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lasound -lpthread
